title: Sparkly Vanilla
description: A few additions and polishes to make the game extra shiny and fresh!
body:
### Stunning and Immersive
---
Updated visual, inspired by Minecraft promotional materials. Experience Minecraft in a gorgeous new way with vibrant color, expressive animations, countless eyecandies, and simplistic art style.


Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft with minimal HUD, "realistic" camera, seasons, and improved sounds.

### Refreshed and Expanded
---
Some aspects of the game are refreshed or expanded upon. Adjustments, like adjusted leveling, experience, and trading system, have been made to minimize grinding, and let you focus on what you actually want to do.


Vanilla friendly features have also been added like structures, dungeons, skill tree, and mobs. This was made to incentivize exploration, and improve the PvE aspect of the game.


Quality of life improvements are also included, like better villager behavior, auto planting sapling, double doors, crafting tweaks, and other.

### Optimized
---
Includes all the popular optimization mods to ensure the best experience.
